sourceSummary.oneLine: Work instruction AM-WS-PT-002 for HnX-PB portable X-ray assembly operations.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a manufacturing work instruction defining assembly steps, materials/tools, fastening force specifications, inspection points, and abnormal-condition cautions for HnX-PB.
keyPoints: Model is HnX-PB and specification/drawing field states Portable.
The document includes SUB Assembly 1, SUB Assembly 2, SUB Assembly 3, and Top & Bottom assembly operations.
Fastening force specifications include 5.0±0.5㎏f/㎝ with inspection frequencies such as 1회/주 and 2회/1일.
Visual inspection and handling cautions are specified for LCD Ass'y, product exterior, Tank Ass'y, Oring installation, and cable connection.

concepts.name: Top cover Ass'y 1
concepts.pageTarget: HnX-PB Top Cover Assembly Work Instruction

concepts.name: Bottom Cover Ass'y 1
concepts.pageTarget: HnX-PB Bottom Cover Assembly Work Instruction

concepts.name: Bottom Cover Ass'y 2
concepts.pageTarget: HnX-PB Bottom Cover Assembly Work Instruction

concepts.name: Top & Bottom 형합
concepts.pageTarget: HnX-PB Top and Bottom Cover Assembly

concepts.name: Oring 체결 주의사항
concepts.evidence: Collimater Oring 체결시 꺾임 ,올라탐이 없도록 한다.

evidence.claim: The document title is Protable X-ray 작업지도서.
The product model identified in the work instruction is HnX-PB.
The revision/version evidence is inconsistent, showing both Rev 1 and 제.개정번호 0.
The revision history states 신규제정 on 2025.07.31.
Top cover assembly includes visual inspection of TOP Cover paint and product condition.
evidence.evidenceText: TOP Cover 도장 및 제품 상태를 육안으로 확인한다. [ 도장 벚겨짐 , S/C . 찍힘 없을것]
evidence.pageTarget: HnX-PB Top Cover Assembly Work Instruction

evidence.claim: Top cover assembly uses materials including TOP_COVER, 4INCH_LCD_ASSY, INVERTER_ASSY, and LED_GUIDE.
Top cover bolt fastening force specification is 5.0±0.5㎏f/㎝ with inspection frequency 2회/1일.
Inverter Ass'y bolt fastening force specification is 5.0±0.5㎏f/㎝ with inspection frequency 2회/1일.
Bottom Cover Ass'y 1 includes inspection of Bottom Case exterior condition.
evidence.evidenceText: Bottom Case 외관 상태를 검사한다 [ 상부 표면 S/C , 찍힘 ]
evidence.pageTarget: HnX-PB Bottom Cover Assembly Work Instruction

evidence.claim: Bottom Cover Ass'y 2 includes fastening Collimator and Bottom Cover using M4*6 screw bolts.
evidence.evidenceText: M4 *6 스크류 볼트를 이용하여 Collimator와 Bottom Cover 를 고정 시킨다.
evidence.pageTarget: HnX-PB Bottom Cover Assembly Work Instruction

evidence.claim: Top & Bottom assembly includes attaching symbols and five sticker types at specified positions.
evidence.pageTarget: HnX-PB Top and Bottom Cover Assembly

evidence.claim: The work instruction cautions that Oring installation must avoid twisting or riding up.
evidence.evidenceText: Collimater Oring 체결시 꺾임 ,올라탐이 없도록 한다.

evidence.claim: The work instruction cautions against cable breakage when connecting inverter, collimator, and tank cables.
evidence.evidenceText: inveter 와 Coliimater & Tank Cable 연결시 끊어지지 않도록 주의한다 .

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only general metadata.
No standards are identified in the source text.
Revision evidence is conflicting: the header shows Rev 1, while revision table and repeated fields show 제.개정번호 0; sourcePath also contains REV.00.
OCR or spreadsheet extraction quality appears low, with repeated typographical errors such as Protable, Inveter, Collimater, Oling, and Fornt.
Page numbering is inconsistent or duplicated in extracted text, including Page 번호 values such as 1,4 and 2,5.
